case_title: JUILUS BRIGGS VS. CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY BRIGGS, JUILUS AS TO DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIGGS, JUILUS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED SEP-04-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY FRED E. DOUGHTY--GENERAL HOTEL DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIGGS, JUILUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
